summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the Uber Metro Receipt Generator. Verified UI rendering, month/year controls, partial-week date logic, live preview date updates, and end-to-end ZIP download with PNG content/filename/dimension validation. All features working as specified — no bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean and well-structured. Receipt.jsx is a single-purpose pixel component; Generator.jsx cleanly orchestrates state, preview, capture and ZIP packaging.

Minor enhancement (non-blocking): the off-screen capture container has opacity:0 with zIndex:-1, but is left in the DOM during generation while previewIndex iterates — works because html2canvas reads layout, not visibility. Considered acceptable.
No data-testid is needed on the receipt itself (already has receipt-canvas testid).
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is purely client-side at root path /. Verified scenarios: (1) Page loads with correct heading 'Recreate an entire month of Uber metro receipts.' and all required test-ids (month-select, year-input, generate-receipts-button, preview-receipt, receipt-count, preview-date-select-{i}). (2) Initial default month/year shows a non-zero receipt count and live preview. (3) Month change to June 2026 = 18 receipts; February 2026 = 16 receipts; October 2026 = 17 receipts (partial week starting Thu Oct 1 correctly included); year change to 2027 also recalculates. (4) Clicking a date chip updates the live preview's internal date header (e.g., chip 17 in June 2026 -> 'Jun 30, 2026, 3:48 pm' shown inside preview receipt). (5) ZIP download via Playwright expect_download produced 'Uber_Receipts_February_2026.zip' (2.49 MB), containing folder 'Uber_Receipts_February_2026/' with exactly 16 PNGs named Uber_Receipt_YYYY-MM-DD_DayName.png, all at 1080x1920 resolution, non-blank content (~39% non-near-black pixels, matching expected layout). (6) Preview content includes all required elements: Uber wordmark, dated subtitle, 'Thanks for booking, Divya', 'Here is the receipt for your metro ticket.', Total/Ticket fare ₹50.00, Payments UPI ₹50.00, 'This is not a tax invoice.' footer.
